title: What's left — two-line self-prescription on the Fallen day
html:
TL;DR

  • February 20, 2026 Apple Note titled "What's left" — two prescriptive bullets: be more structured with lifting all muscles and be more actively curious and pursue.
  • Same calendar day as the "Fallen" four name memorial list (Spencer Sloan, David Morris, Eric Cortez, Victor Ruiz) and the Emily Stevens call — three notes, one day, one mood: a memento mori processing day where Yahir lists who's gone and then asks what's left for me to do.
  • The body is a self prescription: structure the body (lifting / anabolic discipline) and structure the mind (curiosity-as-pursuit, the surface area of luck move).
  • Title-as-question is the inflection: what's left answers fallen — the four dead friends define the negative space, the two bullets define the positive. Same note-pair logic as Oct 2019 diagnosis → Oct 2019 prescription, seven years later.
  • Anchors a Austin era beat where Yahir's mortality-clock and his daily-ops list collapse onto each other on the same screen.

Note

Two lines. The first is body, the second is mind. Both modal-verb prescriptions (be more) — Yahir at 23 issuing himself instructions on the day he listed four dead friends. The instruction is structural: lift all muscles (not just the convenient ones), pursue (not just notice). The implicit fault-line: he's been doing partial-body lifts and passive-curiosity scrolling.

The pairing with "Fallen" and the Emily Stevens call makes the day legible as a memento mori filter applied in real time: who is gone → what is left → what to do with what is left. The two bullets are Yahir's answer to the legacy question in its smallest possible form — put more force through the body, push curiosity past the point of noticing. This is the same-mood, same-day companion to the Fallen entity-page; reading them together is the whole Austin era mortality-stance in one screen.

Connections

  • 2026 02 20 fallen — the negative-space companion
  • 2026 02 20 call with emily stevens — same-day Emily call
  • fallen — the concept the day enacts
  • memento mori decision filter — frame
  • — form
  • supplement stack / anabolic scoring — lifting-discipline thread
  • surface area of luck — curiosity-as-pursuit thread
  • legacy question — the Q the prescriptions answer

related.label: Fallen — four-name memorial list (Spencer Sloan, David Morris, Eric Cortez, Victor Ruiz)
So much shit to do, that we do none — title-as-aphorism
